name: interest-calculator-microservices
description: Microservices for simple and compound interest calculation

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start-simple" "npm run start-compound" "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd simple-interest-service && npm install && cd ../compound-interest-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
